output: Batch 2 executed for T3, T4, T5, and T9. `EffectMetadata` now carries optional `parameterSchema`, `ParameterControls` and `getDefaultValues()` are in place, the edge-function prompt/parser now supports `// DESCRIPTION:` and `// PARAMS:` metadata with resilient extraction, and clip effect rendering now passes per-clip params through to entrance/exit/continuous effects. Verification passed with a clean repo type check, the focused `ai-generate-effect` edge test file, and a direct three-sample parser probe covering fenced output, multiline params, and malformed JSON fallback. The batch checkpoint file was not writable, so no execution checkpoint was written.
deviations: `.megaplan/plans/add-tuneable-parameters-to-20260326-2332/execution_batch_2.json` was not writable, so best-effort checkpointing could not be performed.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended `EffectMetadata` in `src/features/resources/hooks/useResources.ts` with `parameterSchema?: ParameterSchema` and imported `ParameterSchema` from the shared video-editor types module. The new metadata field remains optional, so legacy effects continue to type-check and deserialize unchanged. Repo type check passed.

Added `src/tools/video-editor/components/ParameterControls.tsx` with generic rendering for number, select, boolean, and color parameters using existing shadcn primitives. Each control shows the parameter label and description, and `getDefaultValues(schema)` returns schema defaults with safe fallbacks when `default` is missing or undefined. Repo type check passed.

Updated `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` to include `params` in the effect contract and require `// DESCRIPTION:` plus `// PARAMS:` metadata in generated output. Added `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` with markdown-fence stripping, balanced JSON-array extraction for params, metadata-range removal before code validation, and empty-string/empty-array fallbacks for missing or malformed annotations; `extractEffectCode()` now delegates to the new parser. Verified with the focused edge test file and a direct three-sample parser probe covering inline params, fenced multiline params, and malformed JSON fallback.

Updated `wrapWithClipEffects` in `src/tools/video-editor/effects/index.tsx` to pass `clip.continuous?.params`, `clip.entrance?.params`, and `clip.exit?.params` into the respective effect components. This preserves backward compatibility because built-in effects still ignore the prop and the prop is optional. Repo type check passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. `EffectMetadata` now includes `parameterSchema?: ParameterSchema` in `src/features/resources/hooks/useResources.ts`, and the import from `@/tools/video-editor/types` resolved cleanly under `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`.

Yes. `ParameterControls` renders number via `Slider`, select via `Select`, boolean via `Switch`, and color via `Input type="color"`, with each control showing label and description. `getDefaultValues(schema)` returns explicit defaults when present and safe type-based fallbacks when they are missing or undefined.

Yes. `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` now parses code, description, and parameter schema while handling missing metadata, fenced output, multiline JSON arrays, extra whitespace, and malformed `// PARAMS:` content with empty-string/empty-array fallbacks. This was verified with a focused edge test run plus a three-sample direct parser probe.

Yes. `wrapWithClipEffects` now passes params from clip config into continuous, entrance, and exit effect components via `params={clip.continuous?.params}`, `params={clip.entrance?.params}`, and `params={clip.exit?.params}` respectively.
